steps.title: Find square X perimeter
steps.content:
A square with side length $15$ has perimeter equal to $4$ times its side length.
$$4\cdot 15=60$$

steps.title: Scale square Y perimeter
steps.content:
Square Y has $3$ times that perimeter.
$$3\cdot 60=180$$

steps.title: Convert perimeter to side length
steps.content: Divide the perimeter of square Y by $4$. $$\frac{180}{4}=45$$ The answer is D.
